style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an extreme close-up of the Greek word PYRRHOS calligraphed in molten gold leaf on ancient parchment, with tiny orange embers floating around it
subject.focal_point: the letters themselves emitting warm glow
subject.secondary: The characters appear raised from the page, floating embers drift in slow motion around them
props: the exact Greek text PYRRHOS in gold calligraphy

composition.foreground: gold letters and embers in vivid amber-crimson
composition.background: completely black desaturated void beyond word

style.post_processing: halation, heavy halos, crushed blacks, amber saturation

symbolism.primary: the word pyrrhos revealing fire-red true meaning
symbolism.secondary: glowing Greek letters as living prophecy

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.font_style: ornate Byzantine Greek calligraphy in molten gold leaf

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
